name: Cardiology
description: Comprehensive cardiac care including interventional cardiology, robotic heart surgery, and preventive care.

name: Orthopedics
description: Specialized orthopedic care including joint replacement, sports medicine, spine surgery, and pediatric orthopedics.

name: Gastroenterology
description: GI medicine, hepatology, and advanced diagnostic/therapeutic endoscopy.

name: Pulmonology
description: Pulmonary and respiratory medicine, allergy management, and critical care medicine.

name: Dermatology
description: Clinical and cosmetic dermatology, skin pathology, and advanced laser treatments.

name: Neurology
description: Comprehensive care for neurological disorders including stroke, epilepsy, and neuromuscular conditions.

name: Pediatrics
description: Comprehensive medical care for infants, children, and adolescents.

name: Gynecology & Obstetrics
description: Complete care for women's reproductive health, maternity care, and gynecological surgery.

name: ENT (Ear, Nose, Throat)
description: Diagnostic and surgical interventions for disorders of ear, nose, throat, head, and neck.

name: Nephrology
description: Diagnosis and management of kidney diseases and dialysis services.

name: Urology
description: Complete care for urinary tract system and male reproductive health.

name: Oncology
description: Comprehensive cancer treatment including medical, surgical, and radiation oncology.

name: General Surgery
description: Wide range of surgical treatments including laparoscopic and minimally invasive procedures.

name: Endocrinology
description: Treatment for hormone-related conditions, diabetes, and metabolic disorders.

name: Rheumatology
description: Diagnosis and therapy of rheumatic diseases, arthritis, and autoimmune conditions.
